Theorem oveq1 7403
Description: Equality theorem for operation value. (Contributed by NM, 28-Feb-1995.)
Assertion
Ref Expression
oveq1 ⊢ (𝐴 = 𝐵 → (𝐴𝐹𝐶) = (𝐵𝐹𝐶))
Proof of Theorem oveq1
StepHypRef Expression
1 opeq1 4831 . . 3 ⊢ (𝐴 = 𝐵 → ⟨𝐴, 𝐶⟩ = ⟨𝐵, 𝐶⟩)
21fveq2d 6871 . 2 ⊢ (𝐴 = 𝐵 → (𝐹‘⟨𝐴, 𝐶⟩) = (𝐹‘⟨𝐵, 𝐶⟩))
3 df-ov 7399 . 2 ⊢ (𝐴𝐹𝐶) = (𝐹‘⟨𝐴, 𝐶⟩)
4 df-ov 7399 . 2 ⊢ (𝐵𝐹𝐶) = (𝐹‘⟨𝐵, 𝐶⟩)
52, 3, 43eqtr4g 2822 1 ⊢ (𝐴 = 𝐵 → (𝐴𝐹𝐶) = (𝐵𝐹𝐶))
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   = wceq 1560  ⟨cop 4588  ‘cfv 6521  (class class class)co 7396
